result.stdout:
glider 6.5.0-preview.30
A Roslyn-powered MCP server (stdio or HTTP).

Usage:
  glider [--transport stdio|http] [--port <n>] [--default-timeout <duration>] [--verbose]
  glider --version
  glider --help

Options:
  --transport <stdio|http>   Transport to use (default: stdio).
  --port <n>                 HTTP port (default: 5001).
  --default-timeout <value>  Default timeout for async tools (default: 20m). Use 0 to disable.
                             Supported units: ms, s, m (for example: 10ms, 10s, 10m).
  --verbose                  Enable logging.
  --version, -v              Print version and exit.
  --help, -h                 Show this help and exit.

Examples:
  glider
  glider --default-timeout 30m
  glider --transport http
  glider --transport http --port 8080 --default-timeout 45s
